tracks.meaning: money or something of value risked on the outcome of an uncertain event
a financial interest or share in a business, investment, or enterprise
to risk or wager something of value on an uncertain outcome
a sharpened stick or wooden post driven into the ground to mark boundaries or support plants
the prize or reward at issue in a contest or dispute
a personal interest or involvement in something, often expressed as 'have a stake in'
a wooden post to which a person condemned to death is tied for execution by burning
a pointed wooden post or metal rod driven into the ground for surveying or marking
a pointed stick or peg used to secure a tent to the ground
a pile or stack of items arranged one upon another
